raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing context","name":"Before we get specific, what would be most useful to talk through today?","description":"Gives James control over the agenda and surfaces the issue he most wants to address.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rituals shift","name":"I've noticed you've been less present in some team rituals lately — what's changed on your side?","description":"Uses an observable shift to invite context without assuming the cause.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Promotion feedback","name":"What feedback from the promotion decision actually stuck with you?","description":"Surfaces what he heard versus what was intended, and whether it became usable.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team rituals value","name":"Which team rituals still feel worth your time?","description":"Tests whether his participation has become selective and what he sees as valuable.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring fit","name":"What is the mentoring program doing for your week right now?","description":"Checks whether mentoring is energizing, neutral, or crowding out core work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Path forward","name":"What concrete path do you think exists for you from here?","description":"Invites his own read on the next step and whether he sees a real trajectory.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Priority tradeoff","name":"What are you choosing to put first right now?","description":"Forces a real prioritization view rather than a broad status update.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback action","name":"What would you want to do differently if that feedback were the main thing you acted on?","description":"Moves from hearing feedback to translating it into behavior or focus.","purpose":"competency","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What support from me would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes by identifying concrete support without opening a new topic.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
